calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner V. John Threlkelds Petition To Confirm Arbitration A Ward And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Sep-15-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER V. THRELKELD's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Petition granted per respondent's declaration of non-opposition.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
